posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Ready to boost your monday.com skills?

Join the monday.com certifications team to learn all about our certification program and how it will help you become a monday.com expert. You’ll gain an exclusive behind-the-scenes look at the core certification program and how joining will boost your use of monday.com.

7b28fe39-abe0-44af-995a-b23d5b434ade1280×446 27.1 KB

posts.author: prozaro (Sam Prozaro)
posts.cookedHtml: Is the certification free to take? I’m a partner with Monday.com and would like to take the certification test and perhaps some refresher courses to prep for the test. Please advise. Thanks!

posts.author: joniii (johnii)
posts.cookedHtml:
Earning a Monday.com certification can significantly enhance your ability to get more out of the platform, making you more efficient in managing projects and workflows. Certification provides in-depth knowledge of the tool’s features, helping you leverage its full potential for your team or business.

While optimizing your project management skills, don’t overlook the importance of efficient logistics. For instance, if you’re looking for a solution to streamline parking management, CarParking offers practical APK tools designed to make parking easier and more organized. Explore our site to see how our solutions can complement your enhanced Monday.com expertise.

4o

posts.cookedHtml: I see 2pm EST in the description but when I download the meeting notice it shows 3am Chicago time. What is the actual time of the event?

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml: Will this be available later for people who cannot attend?

posts.cookedHtml: It says free

posts.cookedHtml: • carparking.net.tr offers practical solutions to common parking problems. Their guides make finding parking easy, even in the busiest locations.
